revision.text:
[[ja:二ツ塚古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] | name = Futatsuzuka Kofun | image =
Futatsuzuka Kofun located to the upper right, encroaching on the moat of {{ill|Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|ja|誉田御廟山古墳|1=Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|qq=}}. | location = {{ill|Habikino|qid=Q694308|1=Habikino}} | part_of = {{ill|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|qid=Q4250076|1=Furuichi Kofun Cluster}} | coordinates = 34.563944 | coordinates = 135.6dd444 | type = {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} | area = dd0 meters | built = Late 4th century | burial = | Interred_individual = | burial goods = | Historic sites = National {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|qid=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan|1=Historic site}}} | designation1 designation1 = | notes = Adjacent to {{ill|Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|ja|誉田御廟山古墳|1=Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|qq=}} | map = {{location map|Japan Osaka|map_dot_label=Futatsuzuka Kofun|coordinates=34|coordinates=33|coordinates=50.2|lon_deg=135|lon_min=36|lon_sec=41.2|mark=前方後円墳-北北東.svg|marksize=28|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location within Osaka Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|33|50.2|N|135|36|41.2|E}}}} | architectural_styles = {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|qid=Q11268718|1=Zenpōkōenfun|2=ja|3=前方後円墳|4=ko|5=전방후원분|6=zh|7=前方後圓墳}} }} '''Futatsuzuka Kofun''' (二ツ塚古墳) is a keyhole-shaped {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} dating to the late 4th century, located in {{ill|Habikino|en|Habikino|qid=Q694308|lt=Habikino, Osaka|1=Habikino}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan. It is Historic site as a National {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|qid=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan|1=Historic site}}} and registered as part of the {{ill|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|en|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|qid=Q4250076|lt=Furuichi Kofun Group|1=Furuichi Kofun Cluster}}, a UNESCO World Historic site Site. The kofun is situated adjacent to the eastern side of the {{ill|Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|ja|誉田御廟山古墳|1=Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|qq=}} (purported tomb of {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|en|Emperor Ōjin|qid=Q317997|lt=Emperor Ōjin|1=Emperor Ōjin}}).{{Cite web|url=http://www.mozu-furuichi.jp/jp/learn/map/f12-3.html|title=33-3 Futatsuzuka Kofun|work=Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group World Heritage Site Preservation and Utilization Council|accessdate=2021-dd-30}} == location == The kofun is located on forested and wildland terrain at an elevation of 25 meters. Its eastern side is level with rice fields.[http://www.isekiwalker.com/iseki/dd0931/ Iseki Walker] == burial and Features == The main axis of the kofun is oriented N19°E and includes a surrounding moat. Including the moat, the total length is approximately 140 meters, while the tumulus itself is dd0 meters long. The circular rear mound has a diameter of 73 meters, a height of 10.1 meters, and a top diameter of 12 meters. The rectangular front section measures 60 meters wide, 50 meters long, and 8.6 meters high. The height difference between the front and rear sections is 1.5 meters. The constricted middleportion is 46 meters wide, and the entire surface of the mound is covered with {{ill|Fukiishi|en|Fukiishi|qid=Q11621213|lt=fukiishi|1=Fukiishi}}. == Historical Context == The moat and inner embankment of the {{ill|Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|ja|誉田御廟山古墳|1=Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|qq=}}, constructed 30 to 50 years after Futatsuzuka Kofun, are significantly distorted to avoid this tumulus. Additionally, the outer moat of the larger kofun terminates abruptly before reaching Futatsuzuka Kofun. These features suggest that the individual buried in Futatsuzuka Kofun was closely related to the individual interred in {{ill|Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|ja|誉田御廟山古墳|1=Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Konda Gobyoyama Kofun|qq=}} (possibly Emperor Ōjin).Sankei Shimbun report. == References == {{reflist}}
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|en|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|qid=Q4250076|lt=Furuichi Kofun Group|1=Furuichi Kofun Cluster}} == External Links == * [http://www.isekiwalker.com/iseki/dd0931/ Iseki Walker: Futatsuzuka Kofun] {{Kofun navbar}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] [[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]] [[Template:infobox ancient site]] {{translated page|ja|二ツ塚古墳|version=97867841|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[image:Kondagobyoyama Kofun air.jpg|270px]] [[ja:二ツ塚古墳]] {{wikidata link|Q11371232}} [[Category:Furuichi Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Imperial mausolea and attendant mounds]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]]
